name: FraudPreBillingValidator
purpose: Fraud detection gate at ORDER 1 before any billing commitment. fraudScore threshold from FREEDOM config. Budget restoration via INCRBY on rejection. PCI zero-PAN.
entry: BidAccepted event (after auction succeeds, before billing)
ironRules: IR-1: AI fraud detection at ORDER 1 before any billing. fraudScore threshold from FREEDOM fraud_score_threshold — never hardcoded.
IR-2: fraudScore > threshold → INCRBY(advertiser-budget:{advertiserId}, bidAmountCents) to restore budget. emit FraudDetected.
IR-3: PCI zero-PAN: card.number BLOCKED, card.cvv BLOCKED. paymentMethodToken stored only.
IR-4: Fraud check output stored in audit — catch block includes fraudScore for investigation.
IR-5: tenantId from ALS only — never from event payload.
machineComponents: AI fraud detection at ORDER 1 before billing commitment
fraudScore threshold from FREEDOM config — never hardcoded
INCRBY budget restoration on fraud rejection
PCI zero-PAN: paymentMethodToken only, card data blocked
Fraud audit trail with fraudScore for investigation
freedomComponents: fraud_score_threshold — minimum fraudScore to trigger FraudDetected (0.0-1.0)
fraud_audit_retention_days — how long to retain fraud audit records
